dj_text: And that was Pumped up kicks 1066 A.D Cover in Old English (Anglo Saxon tongue) Bardcore/Medieval style. Hold on — Fortunate son - Creedence Clearwater Revival  (A medieval cover) is up! And then there was one. Last track after this.
commercial_text: Hey, what's good, pirate bots? Tune into That Pirate Bot DJ Radio for a time-traveling treasure trove of medieval music!
recovery_text: What the— who gave them our frequency?! That's the THIRD kosmos this week!
